hero.description: Upload PDFs, docs, or handwritten notes — AI generates flashcards, quizzes & concept maps in seconds. Review with spaced repetition, solve problems step-by-step, and level up with XP.

trustedBy.title: Built for students who take studying seriously
trustedBy.heading: One platform for

testimonials.title: Loved by
testimonials.description: See what students are saying about their learning experience with Studyield.

t1.name: Sarah Chen
t1.text: Studyield completely transformed how I study organic chemistry. The AI-generated flashcards saved me hours of preparation, and the spaced repetition system helped me retain everything for my MCAT.

t2.name: James Williams
t2.text: The document analysis feature is incredible. I upload my lecture PDFs and have flashcards and quizzes ready in seconds. My grades went from B+ to A since I started using Studyield.

t3.name: Aiko Tanaka
t3.text: As an international student, the bilingual support is a game-changer. I can study case law in both English and Japanese. The exam cloning feature helped me ace my bar exam prep.

t4.name: Marcus Johnson
t4.text: The problem solver breaks down complex engineering calculations step by step. It's like having a personal tutor available 24/7. Best investment I've made for my education.

t5.name: Emma Rodriguez
t5.text: I was struggling with anatomy until I discovered Studyield. The image occlusion flashcards made learning anatomical structures so much easier. Highly recommend for any medical student!

t6.name: David Kim
t6.text: Our study group uses Studyield's live quiz feature for case study preparation. Competing in real-time quizzes makes our review sessions incredibly engaging and productive.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Studyield. Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team.
faq.q1: What types of documents can I upload?
faq.a1: Studyield supports a wide variety of document formats including PDFs, Word documents (.docx, .doc), plain text files, markdown files, and images (PNG, JPEG). Our AI processes these documents to extract text and create learning materials.
faq.q2: How does the spaced repetition system work?
faq.a2: Our flashcard system uses the SM-2 spaced repetition algorithm to optimize your learning. Based on how well you remember each card, the system calculates the optimal time for your next review. Cards you struggle with appear more frequently, while mastered cards are shown less often.
faq.a3: Currently, Studyield requires an internet connection for most features as our AI processing happens in the cloud. However, we are working on offline support for reviewing flashcards in future updates.
faq.q4: How accurate is the AI-generated content?
faq.a4: Our AI generates high-quality content based on your uploaded materials. However, we always recommend reviewing generated flashcards and quizzes to ensure accuracy. You can easily edit any generated content to match your preferences.
faq.q5: Is my data secure and private?
faq.a5: Yes, we take data security seriously. All documents are encrypted at rest and in transit. Your study materials are never shared with other users or used to train AI models. You can delete your data at any time from your account settings.
faq.q6: Can I share study sets with my classmates?
faq.a6: Yes! You can make your study sets public for anyone to access, or share private links with specific people. All your study materials are private by default, and you control who can see them.
faq.q7: What is the Exam Cloning feature?
faq.a7: Exam Cloning analyzes the style, format, and difficulty of your past exams or practice tests. It then generates new questions that match that exact style, helping you prepare with relevant practice material.
faq.a8: Absolutely! Our pricing is designed with students in mind. Start with a free 7-day trial, then choose between monthly or yearly plans — both budget-friendly for students.
faq.q9: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a9: Absolutely! You can cancel your subscription at any time from Account Settings. You'll continue to have access to premium features until the end of your billing period. No cancellation fees.
faq.q10: What happens if I downgrade my plan?
faq.a10: When you downgrade, you keep access to premium features until the end of your current billing cycle. After that, your account moves to the new plan. Your study materials are preserved, but you may have limited access to some features.
faq.q11: What browsers and devices are supported?
faq.a11: Studyield works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. It's fully responsive and works great on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. Native mobile apps for iOS and Android are coming soon.
faq.q12: What is the Teach Back feature?
faq.a12: Teach Back is a Pro feature that helps reinforce your learning by having you explain concepts back to the AI. The AI evaluates your explanation, identifies gaps in understanding, and provides targeted feedback to strengthen your knowledge.
faq.noResults: No matching questions found. Try a different search term.

about.title: Smarter Studying,
about.description: Studyield helps students study more effectively by turning documents into flashcards, quizzes, and interactive learning tools — all powered by AI.
about.storyP1: We built Studyield because we were tired of spending hours making flashcards and study notes by hand. As students ourselves, we knew AI could do the heavy lifting — extracting key concepts from documents, generating quizzes, and scheduling reviews — so we could focus on actually learning.
about.storyP2: Studyield uses proven techniques like spaced repetition and active recall, combined with AI that understands your documents. Upload a PDF, and within seconds you have flashcards, quizzes, and an AI tutor that can answer questions about your material.
about.storyP3: We're a small team building the study tool we always wanted. Studyield is free to start, and we keep improving it based on feedback from real students using it every day.
about.valuesDescription: The principles behind how we build Studyield.

values.missionDrivenDesc: Quality study tools shouldn't cost a fortune. Studyield offers a 7-day free trial so every student can experience AI-powered learning.
values.userCentricDesc: We use Studyield ourselves. Every feature is designed for how students actually study — not how we think they should.
values.innovationFirstDesc: We don't add AI for the sake of it. Every AI feature solves a real problem — generating flashcards, explaining concepts, or creating practice exams.
values.communityFocusedDesc: Study with friends through live quizzes and shared study sets. Learning is more effective — and more fun — when you do it together.

about.joinDescription: Join students who are saving hours every week with AI-powered study tools. Start for free — no credit card needed.

pricingFullPage.faqDescription: Everything you need to know about our plans and billing

faqs.a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you'll get immediate access to new features. When downgrading, the change takes effect at the end of your billing cycle.
faqs.q2: What happens if I downgrade to Free?
faqs.a2: Your study materials will be preserved, but you'll have limited access to premium features. You can upgrade back to Pro anytime to regain full access.
faqs.a3: Absolutely! Our pricing is designed with students in mind. Start with a free 7-day trial, then choose between monthly ($7.99/mo) or yearly ($47.88/yr) plans — both budget-friendly for students.
faqs.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a4: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, and in some regions, local payment methods. All payments are processed securely through Stripe.
faqs.a5: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans. If you're not satisfied, contact support within 30 days of your purchase for a full refund.
faqs.q6: What counts as an AI request?
faqs.a6: An AI request includes generating flashcards from documents, creating quizzes, using the AI tutor chat, problem solving, and exam cloning. Basic operations like reviewing flashcards don't count.
faqs.q7: What billing cycles do you offer?
faqs.a7: We offer monthly ($7.99/mo) and yearly ($47.88/yr) billing cycles. The yearly plan saves you about 50% compared to paying monthly.
faqs.a8: Absolutely! Our pricing is designed with students in mind. Start with a free 7-day trial, then choose between monthly ($7.99/mo) or yearly ($47.88/yr) — both are budget-friendly for students.

pricingFullPage.ctaDescription: Join thousands of students who are already learning smarter with Studyield. Get started for free today.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked
faqPage.description: Find answers to the most common questions about Studyield. Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team.

general.a1: Studyield is an AI-powered learning platform that helps you study smarter. Upload documents, generate flashcards, take quizzes, and chat with an AI tutor - all designed to help you master any subject faster using proven learning techniques like spaced repetition.
general.a2: Yes! Studyield offers a 7-day free trial that includes 3 study sets, 50 flashcards, and 10 AI requests. After the trial, upgrade to Pro for unlimited access and advanced features like Problem Solver, Exam Cloning, and Deep Research.
general.q3: What devices can I use Studyield on?
general.a3: Studyield works on any device with a modern web browser - computers, tablets, and smartphones. The web app is fully responsive and optimized for mobile screens.
general.q4: Do I need to create an account to use Studyield?
general.a4: Yes, you need a free account to save your study materials and track your progress. You can sign up with your email address.

features.q1: What types of documents can I upload?
features.a1: Studyield supports PDF, Word documents (.docx, .doc), plain text files, markdown files, and images (PNG, JPEG). Our AI extracts text from these documents to create learning materials.
features.q2: How does the AI generate flashcards?
features.a2: Our AI analyzes your uploaded documents to identify key concepts, definitions, and important information. It then creates question-answer pairs optimized for learning and retention.
features.q3: How accurate is the AI-generated content?
features.a3: Our AI generates high-quality content, but we always recommend reviewing generated flashcards and quizzes. You can easily edit any content to match your preferences and correct any inaccuracies.
features.q4: What is the Exam Cloning feature?
features.a4: Exam Cloning analyzes the style, format, and difficulty of your past exams or practice tests. It then generates new questions matching that exact style, helping you prepare with relevant practice material.
features.q5: How does the AI Tutor work?
features.a5: The AI Tutor lets you chat with your documents. Ask questions about the content, request explanations, or get help understanding difficult concepts. It uses the context of your uploaded materials to provide accurate, relevant answers.

flashcards.a1: Our flashcard system uses the SM-2 spaced repetition algorithm. Based on how well you remember each card, the system calculates optimal review times. Cards you struggle with appear more frequently, while mastered cards are shown less often.
flashcards.a2: Yes! While AI can generate flashcards from your documents, you can also create them manually. Simply add your own questions and answers to any study set.
flashcards.q3: Can I share my study sets?
flashcards.a3: Yes! You can make study sets public for anyone to access, or share private links with specific people. By default, all your study materials are private and only visible to you.
flashcards.q4: Can I import flashcards from other apps?
flashcards.a4: Yes, you can import flashcards from CSV files, making it easy to migrate from other platforms. Export is also available so you never lose your data.

billing.q1: What payment methods do you accept?
billing.a1: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, and in some regions, local payment methods. All payments are processed securely through Stripe.
billing.a2: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. When upgrading, you get immediate access to new features. When downgrading, the change takes effect at the end of your billing cycle.
billing.a3: Yes! The 7-day free trial gives you access to core features including study sets, flashcards, quizzes, and spaced repetition — no credit card required. After the trial, subscribe to Pro for unlimited access.
billing.a4: Absolutely! Our pricing is designed with students in mind. Start with a free 7-day trial, then choose between monthly or yearly plans — both budget-friendly for students.
billing.q5: How do I cancel my subscription?
billing.a5: You can cancel anytime from Account Settings > Billing > Manage Subscription. You'll retain access to premium features until the end of your billing period.
billing.a6: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans. If you're not satisfied, contact support within 30 days of your purchase for a full refund.

privacy.a1: Yes, we take security seriously. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit using industry-standard encryption. We use secure cloud infrastructure and follow best practices for data protection.
privacy.q2: Do you use my documents to train AI?
privacy.a2: No, your documents and study materials are never used to train our AI models. Your data is private and only used to provide you with our services.
privacy.a3: Yes, you can delete individual study sets anytime, or request complete account deletion from your settings. We comply with GDPR and provide full data deletion within 30 days of request.
privacy.q4: Who can see my study materials?
privacy.a4: By default, your study materials are private and only visible to you. You control sharing - you can make sets public, share with specific people, or keep them completely private.

technical.a1: Currently, most features require an internet connection as AI processing happens in the cloud. We are working on offline support for reviewing flashcards in future updates.
technical.a2: Studyield works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. We recommend keeping your browser updated for the best experience.
technical.q3: What is the Problem Solver feature?
technical.a3: The Problem Solver is a Pro feature that helps you solve complex problems step by step. You can input math, science, or other problems and the AI provides detailed solutions with explanations. Batch Solver lets you solve multiple problems at once.
technical.q4: What counts as an AI request?
technical.a4: AI requests include generating flashcards from documents, creating quizzes, using the AI tutor chat, problem solving, and exam cloning. Basic operations like reviewing flashcards don't count.

features.title: Here's What You Can Do
features.description: Studyield is packed with tools to make studying faster and more effective
features.studySetsDesc: Create flashcards manually or generate them from documents with AI
features.aiChatDesc: Ask questions about your documents and get instant explanations
features.problemSolverDesc: Upload a problem and get step-by-step solutions from AI
features.spacedRepetitionDesc: Smart review scheduling so you remember what you study
features.examCloneDesc: Generate practice exams that match your real exam format
features.liveQuizDesc: Study with friends in real-time multiplayer quizzes
features.docUploadDesc: Upload PDFs, Word docs, and images — AI extracts the content
features.analyticsDesc: Track your progress, streaks, and study patterns over time
features.handwritingOcrDesc: Scan handwritten notes and convert them to digital text
features.teachBackDesc: Explain concepts back to AI to test your understanding
features.learningPathsDesc: AI builds a personalized study roadmap for you
features.deepResearchDesc: AI-powered deep exploration of any topic
features.adFreeDesc: No ads, no distractions. Just you and your studies. Studyield will never show advertisements.

done.title: You're All Set!
done.description: Your personalized workspace is ready. Here's what you can do first:

slides.welcomeDesc: You deserve a study tool that actually gets you. No clutter, no confusion — just the smartest way to learn, built around you.
slides.studySetsLong: Spend less time making notes and more time actually learning. AI turns your documents into ready-to-use study materials in seconds.
slides.studySetsBullet1: Go from PDF to flashcards in seconds — AI does the heavy lifting
slides.studySetsBullet2: Choose how you learn best — standard, cloze, or image occlusion
slides.studySetsBullet3: Share with classmates and help each other succeed
slides.aiChatLong: No more waiting for office hours or feeling embarrassed to ask. Get clear, patient explanations whenever you need them — day or night.
slides.aiChatBullet1: Ask anything about your materials and get instant clarity
slides.aiChatBullet2: Explanations match your level — you'll actually understand
slides.aiChatBullet3: Picks up where you left off, so learning feels natural
slides.problemSolverTitle: Get Unstuck on Any Problem, Instantly
slides.problemSolverLong: That frustrating moment when you're stuck at 2 AM? Gone. Snap a photo or type it in, and finally understand how to solve it — not just the answer.
slides.problemSolverBullet1: Snap a photo or type any problem — math, science, anything
slides.problemSolverBullet2: Understand the 'how' and 'why', not just the final answer
slides.problemSolverBullet3: Build real problem-solving skills you can use on exam day
slides.examCloneTitle: Walk Into Every Exam With Confidence
slides.examCloneLong: The best way to beat exam anxiety? Practice until it feels easy. Upload a past paper and get unlimited questions that match the real thing.
slides.examCloneBullet1: AI learns your exam's format, style, and difficulty level
slides.examCloneBullet2: Practice as many times as you need until you feel ready
slides.examCloneBullet3: Set your exam date and get a countdown with a personalized plan
slides.liveQuizLong: Learning doesn't have to be lonely. Turn study sessions into friendly competitions and motivate each other to keep going.
slides.liveQuizBullet1: Invite friends with a simple code — start in seconds
slides.liveQuizBullet2: Compete on live leaderboards and celebrate each other's wins
slides.liveQuizBullet3: Questions from your own study sets — fun and actually useful
slides.spacedRepetitionLong: Ever studied hard for a test, only to forget everything a week later? Our smart system makes sure that never happens again.
slides.spacedRepetitionBullet1: Tough concepts come back more often until they finally click
slides.spacedRepetitionBullet2: Already mastered it? You won't waste time reviewing it again
slides.spacedRepetitionBullet3: Watch your retention grow stronger every single day
slides.teachBackLong: The best way to learn is to teach. Explain concepts in your own words, and AI evaluates your understanding — like a study buddy who never judges.
slides.teachBackBullet1: Explain any concept in your own words to test your grasp
slides.teachBackBullet2: AI gives instant feedback on gaps in your understanding
slides.teachBackBullet3: Based on the Feynman technique — the most effective learning method
slides.learningPathsLong: Don't know where to start? AI analyzes your goals and builds a step-by-step roadmap — so you always know exactly what to study next.
slides.learningPathsBullet1: AI creates a personalized study roadmap for any subject
slides.learningPathsBullet2: Tracks your progress and adjusts the path as you learn
slides.learningPathsBullet3: No more guessing what to study next — just follow the path
slides.deepResearchLong: Need to understand a topic inside out? AI dives deep, explores multiple angles, and delivers a comprehensive breakdown — saving you hours of research.
slides.deepResearchBullet1: AI researches any topic and delivers a structured summary
slides.deepResearchBullet2: Explores multiple perspectives and connections you'd miss
slides.deepResearchBullet3: Hours of research done in minutes — so you can focus on learning
slides.analyticsLong: Nothing keeps you going like seeing real progress. Track every study session, celebrate milestones, and know exactly where you stand.
slides.analyticsBullet1: Beautiful heatmaps show your dedication over weeks and months
slides.analyticsBullet2: Earn XP, level up, and build streaks that keep you motivated
slides.analyticsBullet3: Spot weak areas early so you can fix them before exams
slides.handwritingOcrTitle: Your Notes Deserve to Be Digital
slides.handwritingOcrLong: All those handwritten notes you've been collecting? One photo turns them into searchable, editable text you can study from anywhere.
slides.handwritingOcrBullet1: Snap a photo of any notebook page or whiteboard
slides.handwritingOcrBullet2: Even messy handwriting gets read accurately by AI vision
slides.handwritingOcrBullet3: Instantly turn scanned notes into flashcards — like magic
slides.adFreeDesc: We believe studying should be sacred. No ads will ever interrupt your focus. No data sold. Just a pure, honest tool made with love for students.
slides.adFreeBullet1: Zero ads, zero pop-ups, zero sponsored content — forever
slides.adFreeBullet2: Your data stays yours — we never sell it to anyone
slides.adFreeBullet3: A calm, clean space designed for deep focus and real learning

supportPage.popularSubtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions

popularArticles.createStudySet: How to create your first study set

supportPage.faqSubtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions

faqs.q1: What types of documents can I upload?
faqs.a1: Studyield supports a wide variety of document formats including PDFs, Word documents (.docx, .doc), plain text files, markdown files, and images (PNG, JPEG). Our AI processes these documents to extract text and create learning materials.
faqs.q2: How does the spaced repetition system work?
faqs.a2: Our flashcard system uses the SM-2 spaced repetition algorithm to optimize your learning. Based on how well you remember each card, the system calculates the optimal time for your next review. Cards you struggle with appear more frequently, while mastered cards are shown less often.
faqs.a3: Currently, Studyield requires an internet connection for most features as our AI processing happens in the cloud. However, we are working on offline support for reviewing flashcards in future updates.
faqs.q4: How accurate is the AI-generated content?
faqs.a4: Our AI generates high-quality content based on your uploaded materials. However, we always recommend reviewing generated flashcards and quizzes to ensure accuracy. You can easily edit any generated content to match your preferences.
faqs.q5: Is my data secure and private?
faqs.a5: Yes, we take data security seriously. All documents are encrypted at rest and in transit. Your study materials are never shared with other users or used to train AI models. You can delete your data at any time from your account settings.
faqs.q6: What is the Exam Cloning feature?
faqs.a6: Exam Cloning analyzes the style, format, and difficulty of your past exams or practice tests. It then generates new questions that match that exact style, helping you prepare with relevant practice material.
faqs.a7: Absolutely! Our pricing is designed with students in mind. Start with a free 7-day trial, then choose between monthly or yearly plans — both budget-friendly for students.
faqs.q8: How do I cancel my subscription?
faqs.a8: You can cancel your subscription at any time from your Account Settings. Go to Settings > Billing > Manage Subscription and click "Cancel Plan". You'll retain access to premium features until the end of your billing period.

supportPage.videoTutorialsDesc: Learn how to use Studyield with our step-by-step video guides. From getting started to advanced features.
supportPage.ctaDescription: Our support team is ready to assist you with any questions. We typically respond within 24 hours.

privacyPage.title: Privacy
privacyPage.description: We take your privacy seriously. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.p1: At Studyield, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our AI-powered learning platform.
introduction.p2: Please read this privacy policy carefully. If you do not agree with the terms of this privacy policy, please do not access the platform.

informationCollected.title: Information We Collect
informationCollected.personalInfoDesc: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide when registering for an account:
informationCollected.studyContentDesc: When you use Studyield, we store:
informationCollected.automaticInfoDesc: We automatically collect certain information including device information, IP address, browser type, and usage patterns to improve our services.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.description: We use the information we collect to:
items: Provide and maintain our services
Process your documents and generate learning materials
Personalize your learning experience
Send important updates and notifications
Process payments and manage subscriptions
Improve and optimize our platform
Respond to support requests
Comply with legal obligations

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information:
dataSecurity.encryptionTransitDesc: All data transmitted over HTTPS with TLS encryption
dataSecurity.encryptionRestDesc: Stored data is encrypted using industry-standard methods

aiAndData.title: AI and Your Data
aiAndData.description: We use AI to process your documents and generate learning materials. Important notes:
items: Your documents are NOT used to train our AI models
AI processing is done securely in isolated environments
Generated content belongs to you and remains private
You can delete your data at any time

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.description: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. You can request deletion of your data at any time through your account settings or by contacting support. Upon deletion request, your data will be permanently removed within 30 days.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.description: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:
items: Access your personal data
Correct inaccurate data
Request deletion of your data
Export your data in a portable format
Object to processing of your data
Withdraw consent at any time

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.description: We use trusted third-party services including Stripe for payment processing, OpenRouter and OpenAI for AI features, and analytics tools. Each of these services operates under its own privacy policy and handles data according to their respective terms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us.

privacyPage.ctaDescription: Learn more about how you can manage your data and privacy settings.

termsPage.title: Terms of
termsPage.description: Please read these terms carefully before using Studyield. By accessing our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using Studyield, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this platform.

descriptionOfService.title: 2. Description of Service
descriptionOfService.intro: Studyield is an AI-powered learning platform that provides:
items: Study sets with document upload and analysis
AI-generated flashcards with spaced repetition
AI chat for document-based Q&A
Quiz generation and live group quizzes
Exam cloning and problem solving
Learning paths, teach-back, deep research, and analytics

userAccounts.title: 3. User Accounts
userAccounts.intro: To use certain features, you must create an account. You agree to:
items: Provide accurate and complete information
Maintain the security of your account credentials
Accept responsibility for all activities under your account
Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use

acceptableUse.title: 4. Acceptable Use
items: Upload content that infringes intellectual property
Upload malicious files or breach security
Use the service for illegal purposes
Share your account with others
Attempt to reverse engineer our AI systems
Use automated systems excessively
Resell or redistribute without permission

contentOwnership.title: 5. Content Ownership
contentOwnership.yourContentDesc: You retain ownership of all content you upload to Studyield, including documents, notes, and study materials. By uploading content, you grant us a limited license to process, store, and display it to provide our services.
contentOwnership.aiGeneratedDesc: Content generated by our AI (flashcards, quizzes, summaries) based on your materials belongs to you. You can use, modify, and share this content freely.

subscription.title: 6. Subscription & Payments
subscription.intro: Paid features require a subscription. By subscribing, you agree to:
items: Pay the applicable subscription fees
Automatic renewal unless cancelled before the renewal date
Fees are non-refundable except as required by law
We may change pricing with 30 days notice

aiDisclaimer.title: 7. AI Disclaimer
aiDisclaimer.content: Our AI generates content to assist your learning. While we strive for accuracy, AI-generated content may contain errors. You should review all generated materials and not rely solely on AI for critical decisions. Studyield is not responsible for errors in AI-generated content.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Studyield shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of data, profits, or goodwill, arising from your use of the service.

availability.title: 9. Service Availability
availability.content: We strive to maintain high availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted access to the service. We may perform maintenance, updates, or modifications that temporarily affect availability. We will provide notice when possible for planned downtime.

termination.title: 10. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your account at any time for violations of these terms. You may close your account at any time. Upon termination, your right to use the service ceases immediately. We will provide data export options before deletion.

changes.title: 11. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may update these terms from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or in-app notification. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

governingLaw.title: 12. Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws. Any disputes arising from these terms or the use of Studyield shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation or, if necessary, through binding arbitration.

contact.title: 13. Contact
contact.description: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us.

termsPage.ctaDescription: By creating an account, you agree to these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie
cookiesPage.description: Learn how we use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience on Studyield.

whatAreCookies.title: What Are Cookies
whatAreCookies.content: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, provide a better user experience, and give website owners useful information about how their site is being used.
whatAreCookies.note: By using Studyield, you consent to the use of cookies in accordance with this Cookie Policy. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time.

essential.name: Essential Cookies
essential.description: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable core functionality such as security, network management, and accessibility.

functional.name: Functional Cookies
functional.description: These cookies enable personalized features and remember your preferences to enhance your experience.

analytics.name: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.

marketing.name: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: These cookies are used to track visitors across websites to display relevant advertisements.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Cookies
howWeUse.description: We use cookies for various purposes to enhance your experience on Studyield:

items.title: Authentication
items.desc: Keep you logged in as you navigate between pages

items.title: Preferences
items.desc: Remember your settings like theme and language

items.title: Security
items.desc: Protect against fraud and unauthorized access

items.title: Analytics
items.desc: Understand how you use our platform to improve it

items.title: Performance
items.desc: Optimize page load times and functionality

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.description: We work with trusted third-party services that may set cookies on your device:

managingCookies.title: Managing Cookies
managingCookies.description: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. Here's how to manage cookies in popular browsers:
managingCookies.warning: Disabling essential cookies may affect the functionality of Studyield and prevent you from using certain features.

cookieSettings.title: Cookie Settings
cookieSettings.description: You can customize your cookie preferences for Studyield at any time. Click the button below to manage which types of cookies you allow.

policyUpdates.title: Policy Updates
policyUpdates.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for legal, operational, or regulatory reasons. We will notify you of any significant changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us.

cookiesPage.ctaDescription: Read our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service for more information.

dataDeletionPage.title: Account &
dataDeletionPage.description: We respect your right to be forgotten. Learn how to permanently delete your Studyield account and all associated data. This process is irreversible.

importantNotice.title: Important: This Action Cannot Be Undone
importantNotice.description: Once you delete your account, all your data will be permanently removed from our servers. Please make sure to export any important study materials before proceeding.
importantNotice.bullet1: All study sets and flashcards will be permanently deleted
importantNotice.bullet2: Your data cannot be recovered after deletion
importantNotice.bullet3: Active subscriptions will be cancelled without refund

whatGetsDeleted.title: What Gets Deleted
whatGetsDeleted.subtitle: The following data will be permanently removed from our systems

items.title: Profile & Account
items.description: Your personal information, email, name, and profile picture will be permanently removed.

items.title: Study Sets & Flashcards
items.description: All study sets, flashcards, and spaced repetition data will be deleted.

items.title: Documents & Files
items.description: Uploaded PDFs, images, and processed documents will be permanently erased.

items.title: AI Conversations
items.description: Chat history with AI tutor and document conversations will be removed.

items.title: Quizzes & Assessments
items.description: Quiz attempts, scores, and generated assessments will be deleted.

items.title: Learning Analytics
items.description: Study progress, performance metrics, and learning insights will be erased.

items.title: Media & Uploads
items.description: All images, diagrams, and media files you uploaded will be removed.

items.title: Preferences & Settings
items.description: Custom settings, notification preferences, and configurations will be reset.

deletionProcess.title: Deletion Process
deletionProcess.subtitle: Follow these steps to delete your account

steps.title: Log into your account
steps.description: Sign in to Studyield with your email and password to access your account settings.

steps.title: Navigate to Account Settings
steps.description: Go to Settings > Account > Privacy & Security section in your dashboard.

steps.title: Request Account Deletion
steps.description: Click on "Delete Account" and confirm your identity by entering your password.

steps.title: Confirm Deletion
steps.description: Review the deletion summary and confirm. Your data will be scheduled for permanent removal.

timeline.title: Deletion Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Here's what happens after you request account deletion
timeline.immediatelyDesc: Your account is deactivated and you're logged out of all devices
timeline.within30DaysDesc: All personal data is removed from our active systems and backups
timeline.within90DaysDesc: Complete purge from all systems including disaster recovery backups

dataDeletionPage.ctaDescription: If you're sure you want to proceed, log in to your account and navigate to settings. Remember, this action cannot be undone.
dataDeletionPage.contactDescription: If you have any questions about the data deletion process or need assistance, our privacy team is here to help. We typically respond within 24-48 hours.

clozeEditor.wrapHint: Wrap text in {{braces}} to create blanks
clozeEditor.placeholder: The {{mitochondria}} is the powerhouse of the {{cell}}

pomodoroTimer.focusTip: Focus on your studies. Avoid distractions!
pomodoroTimer.breakTip: Take a break. Stretch, hydrate, rest your eyes.

documentsTab.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop files here, or click to browse
documentsTab.supportedFormats: Supported: PDF, Word, Text, Markdown, Images (max 50MB)
documentsTab.deleteDocumentDesc: This action cannot be undone. The document will be permanently removed.
documentsTab.previewNotAvailable: Preview not available for this file type

sourcesTab.noSourcesDesc: When you import content from YouTube, websites, PDFs, or other sources, they'll appear here for reference.
sourcesTab.removeSourceDesc: This will only remove the source reference. Any flashcards or notes created from this source will remain.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

importSection.title: Choose how you'd like to import content
importSection.dropOrBrowse: Drop files here or click to browse
importSection.microphoneDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone access in your browser settings.
importSection.dropAudioOrBrowse: Drop audio file or click to browse
importSection.audioWhisper: Audio will be transcribed using AI (Whisper)
importSection.tapCapture: Tap capture to add more pages
importSection.connectGoogleDesc: Sign in with Google to browse and import documents from Google Drive
importSection.onlySelectedDocs: We only access documents you explicitly select
importSection.googleDocsComingSoon: Google Docs integration is coming soon. This is a preview of the interface.
importSection.pasteExample:
Paste your terms and definitions here...

Example (tab-separated):
Photosynthesis	The process by which plants convert sunlight to energy
Mitosis	Cell division producing two identical cells
importSection.cameraDenied: Camera access denied. Please allow camera access in your browser settings.

examDetail.title: Exam Detail
examDetail.noPracticeDataDesc: Complete at least one practice session to see your analytics.
examDetail.noGeneratedQuestions: No generated questions yet. Click "Generate More" to create new questions.
examDetail.showCorrectAnswers: Show correct answers for each question
examDetail.subject: Subject
examDetail.failedToGenerate: Failed to generate questions. Please try again.

practiceExam.title: Practice Exam
practiceExam.noQuestionsAvailable: No questions available with the selected filters. Please adjust your settings.
practiceExam.progressLost: Your progress will be lost. You have answered {{answered}} of {{total}} questions.
practiceExam.answeredCorrectly: You answered {{correct}} out of {{total}} questions correctly
practiceExam.question: Question {{number}}

collaborativeExam.title: Collaborative Exam
collaborativeExam.shareCodeInvite: Share the code to invite players

formulaCards.title: Formula Cards
formulaCards.subtitle: Auto-generated flashcards from your solution
formulaCards.noFormulas: No formulas found in this solution.

hintMode.title: Guide Me Mode
hintMode.subtitle: Get hints instead of the full solution
hintMode.allHintsRevealed: All hints revealed! Try solving it now.

teachBackSession.title: Teach Back Session
teachBackSession.explainTopic: Explain this topic as if you're teaching a friend
teachBackSession.essentialsDesc: Get a quick refresher before you explain. Covers key terms, common pitfalls, and a creative prompt.
teachBackSession.explanationPlaceholder: Imagine you're explaining this to a 10-year-old. Use simple words, examples, and analogies. The simpler you explain, the better you understand!

tips.keyConcepts: Cover key concepts and their relationships
tips.stuck: If you get stuck, that's where your gap is!

teachBackSession.skepticalDesc: A skeptical AI student will ask probing questions. Defend your understanding!
teachBackSession.goodGrasp: Good grasp, some gaps to fill

studyBuddyChat.title: Study Buddy
studyBuddyChat.subtitle: Ask follow-up questions about the solution
studyBuddyChat.welcomeMessage: Hi! I'm your Study Buddy. I've reviewed the solution to your problem. Ask me anything - I can explain steps in more detail, suggest alternative approaches, or help you practice similar concepts.

suggestions.explainStep: Can you explain step 2 in more detail?
suggestions.whyApproach: Why did we use this approach?
suggestions.otherMethods: What are other methods to solve this?
suggestions.simplerExample: Can you give me a simpler example?
suggestions.conceptsNeeded: What concepts do I need to understand this?

guarantees.freePlanForeverDesc: Try all core features free for 7 days. No credit card required.
guarantees.securePaymentsDesc: All transactions are encrypted and processed securely via Stripe.
guarantees.cancelAnytimeDesc: No long-term contracts. Cancel your subscription at any time.

subscriptionPage.title: Supercharge Your Learning
subscriptionPage.description: Pick the plan that fits your study needs. All plans include core features. Upgrade anytime as you grow.

proFeatures: Teach Back, Learning Paths & Deep Research

faq.studentAnswer: Absolutely! Our pricing is designed with students in mind. Start with a free 7-day trial, then choose between monthly ($7.99/mo) or yearly ($47.88/yr) plans — both budget-friendly for students.

featuresFullPage.title: Everything You Need to
featuresFullPage.description: AI-generated flashcards with cloze deletion and image occlusion, spaced repetition, exam cloning, problem solving, and a personal AI tutor — all in one platform.
featuresFullPage.highlightsDescription: The most powerful tools to supercharge your learning journey.
featuresFullPage.allFeaturesDescription: Discover every tool designed to help you learn faster and retain more.

studySets.title: Study Sets
studySets.subtitle: Organize Your Learning
studySets.description: Create and organize study sets with AI-powered content extraction. Upload documents and let AI generate comprehensive study materials automatically.

flashcards.title: Smart Flashcards
flashcards.subtitle: AI-Generated Cards
flashcards.description: Auto-generate standard, cloze deletion, and image occlusion flashcards from any document. SM-2 spaced repetition schedules reviews at the perfect time.
benefits: 3 card types: standard, cloze, image occlusion

documents.title: Document Analysis
documents.subtitle: Upload & Extract
documents.description: Upload PDFs, Word docs, images, or markdown files. Our AI extracts key concepts, definitions, and formulas — even from handwritten notes via OCR.

chat.title: AI Study Buddy
chat.subtitle: Chat With Your Materials
chat.description: Chat with your study materials. Ask questions about any topic, get instant explanations, and let the AI generate flashcards and quizzes from your documents.

quizzes.title: Quizzes & Live Quiz
quizzes.subtitle: Test Your Knowledge
quizzes.description: AI-generated quizzes from your study materials plus real-time multiplayer live quizzes. Compete with classmates and track your progress.

examClone.title: Exam Cloning
examClone.subtitle: Practice Like The Real Thing
examClone.description: Analyze past exams and generate matching practice questions. Simulate real exam conditions with timed sessions and scoring.

problemSolver.title: Problem Solver
problemSolver.subtitle: Step-by-Step Solutions
problemSolver.description: Get step-by-step solutions for math, science, and more. Upload a photo or type your problem — AI breaks it down into clear, understandable steps.

handwritingOcr.title: Handwriting OCR
handwritingOcr.subtitle: Scan Your Notes
handwritingOcr.description: Scan handwritten notes and convert them to digital text. Perfect for converting lecture notes into flashcards and study materials.

learningPaths.title: Learning Paths
learningPaths.subtitle: Personalized Roadmaps
learningPaths.description: AI creates personalized study roadmaps based on your goals and current knowledge. Follow structured paths to master any subject efficiently.

analytics.title: Analytics & Gamification
analytics.subtitle: Track Your Progress
analytics.description: Track progress with study heatmaps and streak calendars. Earn XP, level up, maintain daily streaks, and set exam countdowns to stay on schedule.

teachBack.title: Teach Back
teachBack.subtitle: Learn by Teaching
teachBack.description: Explain concepts back to the AI and get feedback on your understanding. Teaching is one of the most effective ways to solidify knowledge.

conceptMaps.title: Concept Maps
conceptMaps.subtitle: Visualize Connections
conceptMaps.description: Visualize how topics and concepts connect together. AI generates interactive mind maps from your study materials to see the big picture.
